description: Authorised domains for data references in jobseeker-rates.json. Only URLs from these domains may be used as references for payment rates, thresholds, and rules.

sources.name: Services Australia
sources.description: Official government agency administering Centrelink payments. Authoritative source for payment rules, eligibility criteria, and income/asset test details.

sources.name: Department of Social Services
sources.description: Federal department responsible for social security policy. Publishes official indexed payment rates twice yearly (March 20 and September 20).

sources.name: Federal Register of Legislation
sources.description: Official source for the Social Security Act 1991 and Social Security (Administration) Act 1999 which define payment rules in law.

sources.name: Centrelink
sources.description: Centrelink online services portal. Redirects to Services Australia for most content but some legacy URLs remain active.

sources.name: Department of Human Services (legacy)
sources.description: Former department name before Services Australia rebrand. Some archived content and PDFs still hosted here.
